description: 1000+ 5-star reviews. Expert fades, classic cuts, and hot towel shaves on East Colfax Ave since 2010.

services.name: Alfani's Cut
services.description: Alfani's Signature Haircut delivered by the GOATs. Clippers on sides, scissor-cut top, finished with hot lather neck shave.

services.name: Combo Cut + Beard
services.description: Full grooming experience with clippers and scissors for the perfect cut, plus clean beard trim. Hot lather neck shave included.

services.name: Two Bits
services.description: Classic haircut paired with traditional face shave. Sharp. Clean. Legendary.

services.name: Zero Fade
services.description: Crisp zero fade, one step before bald. Scissors or clippers on top, hot lather neck shave finish.

services.name: Kids Haircut
services.description: Patient, friendly service for the little ones. Great cut every time.

services.name: Beard Trim
services.description: Clean shape and trim to keep your beard looking its sharpest.

services.name: Hot Towel Shave
services.description: Traditional straight razor shave with hot towel treatment. The full barbershop experience.

services.name: Line Up / Edge Up
services.description: Clean edge-up around hairline, temples, and neckline.

barbers.name: Arthur 'Abo'
barbers.bio: Proud Coloradan, graduated from one of the top barber schools in NYC. Cutting professionally since 2007. Barbering is my craft, my passion, and my lifestyle. Every cut is personal, every client matters.

barbers.name: David
barbers.bio: Whether it's a clean skin fade, a bold transformation, or a tricky cut others won't touch, I'm all in. I take time to understand what clients want, even when they don't have the words for it.

barbers.name: Lucca
barbers.bio: Picked up my first clippers at 23. Mastering precision and creativity with deep understanding of all hair types, thanks to my roots in Brazil. I'm here to elevate your look.

barbers.name: Maria
barbers.bio: Double licensed professional with both barber and cosmetology licenses. My mission has always been to make people feel great about themselves. I enjoy cutting hair and wouldn't change it for anything.
